name: autonexus
description: Autonomous iteration engine with Obsidian knowledge backbone. 18 commands: core loop, plan, predict, debug, fix, security, ship, scenario, learn, setup, resume, status, review, agile, refine-backlog, chain, canvas, hook. Full Agile sprint lifecycle with 28+ autonomous agent roles. Workflow composition, event-driven hooks, and on-demand canvas visualization. Every iteration reads from and writes to Obsidian.
